mapper.insert: INSERT INTO major ( name, active, college, room, tel, chair_professor, capacity, start_date, info ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{active}, #{college}, #{room}, #{tel}, #{chairProfessor}, #{capacity}, #{startDate}, #{info} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.major_id, m.name, m.capacity, m.room, m.tel, m.college, m.active, m.chair_professor, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM professor p WHERE p.major_id = m.major_id) AS professorCount FROM major m ORDER BY m.name ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE major SET name = #{name}, active = #{active}, college = #{college}, room = #{room}, tel = #{tel}, chair_professor = #{chairProfessor}, capacity = #{capacity}, start_date = #{startDate}, info = #{info} WHERE major_id = #{majorId}
mapper.select: SELECT name, active, college, room, tel, chair_professor, capacity, start_date, info FROM major WHERE major_id = #{majorId}
